title: Something I realized about Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Apr 11, 2021 2:25 pm There was something about Asuka that came off as tragic, and it’s the fact that she was a part of the machinations of Gendo and SEELE. Yes, that much is obvious by now, but it was something I’ve picked up, and it’s really sad about what she has been through. I mean, think about it; if wasn’t for NERV, Asuka’s mother would still be around and she would’ve had a more normal childhood. There was something else I’ve found out about her in Rebuild, but I will not discuss it here. A kid born and raised to pilot an EVA and nothing else, could you imagine what that experience was like for her? She was just merely used as a tool for NERV and SEELE to achieve their end results. They totally screwed her life over, and that’s just tragic, to have her be a nobody without the use of an EVA. It’s almost as if NERV practically molded her into becoming an empty shell of a person for their sick twisted end game. You just can’t help but feel sorry for her.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 11, 2021 3:46 pm The search terms being frequent as they are, I've not been able to track any of the posts where I had made the point that to NERV she was just a disposable weapon at the end. In childhood, she would have been a jealously guarded resource, especially by the NERV Germany personnel without access to the big picture conspiracy, a pampered princess when she wasn't doing pilot training and her hot-housed education, but a child soldier none the less. The phrases "poor little rich girl" and "bird in a gilded cage" also fit her. Related posts of mine post/868096/Thoughts-on-Asuka/#868096 post/488078/The-Asuka-Langley-Soryu-in-my-mind/#488078

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Wed Apr 14, 2021 9:37 am Asuka's bad temper and always tries to gain attention all got to do with her tragic past. She wanted to cover her sadness and weakness, no doubt a very tragic figure.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Wed Apr 14, 2021 3:41 pm Slowpokeking wrote: Asuka's bad temper and always tries to gain attention all got to do with her tragic past. She wanted to cover her sadness and weakness, no doubt a very tragic figure.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Wed Apr 14, 2021 4:16 pm C.T.1290 wrote: Slowpokeking#920218 wrote: Asuka's bad temper and always tries to gain attention all got to do with her tragic past. She wanted to cover her sadness and weakness, no doubt a very tragic figure.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Apr 16, 2021 5:36 pm When this occurred to me, I finally understood her anger towards Shinji. Although, not at all his fault, Asuka was raised solely as a pilot with a lifetime of training behind her. I bet she spent her entire childhood driving up her sync ratio. She was probably even trained to suppress her PTSD to get her scores even higher. Some kid the same age just "walks in off the street" (so to speak) and instantly outperforms her.. That's gotta sting! If I was her, I'd probably hate him too, and it sucks because he doesn't even deserve it.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 17, 2021 12:42 am ^ Exactly so.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by walucigi » Wed Apr 21, 2021 9:56 am AWinters wrote: When this occurred to me, I finally understood her anger towards Shinji. Although, not at all his fault, Asuka was raised solely as a pilot with a lifetime of training behind her.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by AWinters » Wed Apr 21, 2021 3:09 pm walucigi wrote: Its a similar situation between Rei and Asuka. I think Asuka picked on Rei at times because Gendo praised Rei the most. And Rei didn't want or care for the praise and affection. Whereas Asuka is dying to recieve that from Gendo. So when she sees Rei basically throw that away, she gets mad. Especially since she was trained to become an eva pilot and Gendo is the head of NERV, yet he doesn't pay any attention to her.

[]: Re: Something I realized about Asuka             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Apr 21, 2021 4:43 pm AWinters wrote: Maybe she flipped about Toji becoming a pilot
